creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Vladimir Nikolic <vladimir.nikolic@amis.si> -----

From: Vladimir Nikolic <vladimir.nikolic@amis.si>
To: linimon@FreeBSD.org
CC: vladimir.nikolic@amis.net, freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: kern/147961: crash when forwarding enabled between two Broadcom
	cards on gigabit ports

bce0: <HP NC373i Multifunction Gigabit Server Adapter (B2)> mem
0xf8000000-0xf9ffffff irq 18 at device 0.0 on pci3
ce1: <HP NC373i Multifunction Gigabit Server Adapter (B2)> mem
0xfa000000-0xfbffffff irq 19 at device 0.0 on pci5
